seoTitle: Dismal Swamp vs Donovans — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dismal Swamp and Donovans. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Dismal Swamp vs Donovans: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dismal Swamp and Donovans.
heading: Dismal Swamp vs Donovans — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dismal Swamp, South Australia and Donovans, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Donovans has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Dismal Swamp (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dismal Swamp or Donovans safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dismal Swamp has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Donovans scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dismal Swamp scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Donovans scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dismal Swamp or Donovans?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Donovans has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
